series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, complaints received by the Division, Division correspondence, mediation agreements, accommodation agreements or any other records produced as a result of a complaint resolved through the Division''s mediation process affecting appraisers, real estate licensees, appraisal management companies, manufactured home program and home inspectors. These records will contain confidential information pursuant to Ohio Revised Code Sections 2710.03 & 2710.07.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records maintained in paper form shall be maintained on-site for one year from the date of fulfillment of the accommodation agreement or the date the notice was sent to the parties indicating the mediation was unsuccessful and the complaint will be forwarded to the investigation section. Then the paper records shall be destroyed. ; Electronic: For any records maintained in machine readable format, the records shall be maintained on-site for one year from the date of fulfillment of the accommodation agreement or the date the notice was sent to the parties indicating the mediation was unsuccessful and the complaint will be forwarded to the investigation section. Then the machine readable record shall be destroyed. ; Microform: For any records maintained in microform, the records shall be maintained on-site for one year from the date of fulfillment of the accommodation agreement or the date the notice was sent to the parties indicating the mediation was unsuccessful and the complaint will be forwarded to the investigation section. Then the microform shall be destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
